title: Inventory Management System
challenge: A mid-sized distribution company struggled with manual stock tracking across multiple warehouses, leading to frequent stockouts and over-ordering.
solution: We built a centralised inventory management platform with real-time stock visibility, automated reorder alerts, barcode scanning integration, and role-based dashboards for warehouse and management teams.
outcome: The client reduced stock discrepancies by 40% and improved order fulfilment speed within the first quarter after deployment.

title: Patient Appointment Platform
challenge: A healthcare provider needed a digital solution to manage patient appointments, reduce no-shows, and streamline clinic scheduling.
solution: We developed a cross-platform mobile app with online booking, SMS reminders, doctor availability management, and a secure patient records module compliant with data privacy requirements.
outcome: Appointment no-shows decreased by 25% and administrative workload for front-desk staff reduced significantly.

title: Multi-Vendor E-commerce Marketplace
challenge: A retail entrepreneur wanted to launch an online marketplace connecting local vendors with customers across multiple cities in India.
solution: We delivered a scalable marketplace with vendor onboarding, product catalogues, payment gateway integration, order tracking, and an admin panel for platform management.
outcome: The platform onboarded 50+ vendors within three months of launch with steady month-on-month transaction growth.

title: Field Service Management App
challenge: A facilities management company needed to coordinate field technicians, track job assignments, and capture service reports on-site.
solution: We built a mobile app for technicians with GPS-based job routing, digital checklists, photo capture, and a web dashboard for dispatchers to assign and monitor work orders.
outcome: Average job completion time improved by 30% and customer satisfaction scores increased due to faster response times.

title: Learning Management Portal
challenge: An education institute required an online platform to deliver courses, track student progress, and manage assessments remotely.
solution: We created an LMS with course modules, video content delivery, quiz engines, progress analytics, and certificate generation for completed programmes.
outcome: The institute expanded its reach to 2,000+ online learners within the first year of platform operation.

title: POS Integration System
challenge: A retail chain needed to synchronise point-of-sale data across 20+ store locations with their central ERP system.
solution: We developed a Windows-based POS connector application with real-time data sync, offline mode support, and a robust API layer connecting to the client's ERP backend.
outcome: Data synchronisation delays were eliminated and central reporting accuracy improved across all store locations.

title: Document Workflow Automation
challenge: A professional services firm spent excessive time on manual document approvals and version control across departments.
solution: We implemented a document workflow system with automated routing, digital signatures, version history, audit trails, and integration with existing email and storage systems.
outcome: Document approval cycles shortened by 50% and compliance audit preparation time reduced substantially.

title: Business Analytics Dashboard
challenge: A logistics company lacked consolidated visibility into fleet performance, delivery metrics, and operational costs.
solution: We built a cloud-hosted analytics dashboard aggregating data from GPS trackers, delivery systems, and financial records with interactive charts and exportable reports.
outcome: Management gained real-time operational insights, enabling data-driven decisions that reduced fuel costs by 15%.
